NKJV.1: A Song of Ascents. Behold, bless the LORD, All you servants of the LORD, Who by night stand in the house of the LORD!
NKJV.2: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, And bless the LORD.
NKJV.3: The LORD who made heaven and earth Bless you from Zion!

KJV.1: A Song<S>7892</S> of degrees<S>4609</S>. Behold, bless<S>1288</S> ye the LORD<S>3068</S>, all ye servants<S>5650</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>, which by night<S>3915</S> stand<S>5975</S> in the house<S>1004</S> of the LORD<S>3068</S>.
KJV.2: Lift up<S>5375</S> your hands<S>3027</S> in the sanctuary<S>6944</S>, and bless<S>1288</S> the LORD<S>3068</S>. <sup>the sanctuary: or, holiness</sup>
KJV.3: The LORD<S>3068</S> that made<S>6213</S> heaven<S>8064</S> and earth<S>776</S> bless<S>1288</S> thee out of Zion<S>6726</S>.

ESV.1: Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD, who stand by night in the house of the LORD!
ESV.2: Lift up your hands to the holy place and bless the LORD!
ESV.3: May the LORD bless you from Zion, he who made heaven and earth!

NASB.1: A Song of Ascents. Behold, bless the LORD, all servants of the LORD, Who serve by night in the house of the LORD!
NASB.2: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary And bless the LORD.
NASB.3: May the LORD bless you from Zion, He who made heaven and earth.

NLT.1:
Oh, praise the LORD, all you servants of the LORD,
you who serve at night in the house of the LORD.
NLT.2:
Lift your hands toward the sanctuary,
and praise the LORD.
NLT.3:
May the LORD, who made heaven and earth,
bless you from Jerusalem.

WEB.1: A Song of Ascents. Look! Praise Yahweh, all you servants of Yahweh, who stand by night in Yahweh’s house!
WEB.2: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary. Praise Yahweh!
WEB.3: May Yahweh bless you from Zion; even he who made heaven and earth.

CSB17.1:
A song of ascents. [1] Now bless the LORD,
all you servants of the LORD
who stand in the LORD’s house at night! ⓖ
CSB17.2:
Lift up your hands in the holy place
and bless the LORD! ⓗ
CSB17.3:
May the LORD,
Maker of heaven and earth,
bless you from Zion. ⓘ

AMP.1:
A Song of Ascents. Behold, bless and praise the LORD, all servants of the LORD (priests, Levites),
Who stand and serve by night in the house of the LORD.
AMP.2:
Lift up your hands to the sanctuary
And bless the LORD.
AMP.3:
May the LORD bless you from Zion,
He who made heaven and earth.

MSG.1:
A pilgrim song
Come, bless God,
all you servants of God!
You priests of God, posted to the nightwatch
in God's shrine,
MSG.2:
Lift your praising hands to the Holy Place,
and bless God.
MSG.3:
In turn, may God of Zion bless you—
God who made heaven and earth!

NIV.1:
Psalm 134
A song of ascents.
Praise the Lord, all you servants of the Lord
who minister by night in the house of the Lord.
NIV.2:
Lift up your hands in the sanctuary
and praise the Lord.
NIV.3:
May the Lord, the Maker of heaven and earth,
bless you from Zion.

NRSVCE.1:
Come, bless the LORD, all you servants of the LORD,
who stand by night in the house of the LORD!
NRSVCE.2:
Lift up your hands to the holy place,
and bless the LORD.
NRSVCE.3:
May the LORD, maker of heaven and earth,
bless you from Zion.

NET.1: Attention! Praise the LORD, all you servants of the LORD, who serve in the LORD’s temple during the night.
NET.2: Lift your hands toward the sanctuary and praise the LORD!
NET.3: May the LORD, the Creator of heaven and earth, bless you from Zion!
